Katherine Harwood, Esq. 562-983-2500 Behar Gibbs Savage Paulson LLP for Defendant Family Creations.
Court reporter: Cammi Bowen, CSR #13492, 408-28-1509, cr.cammi@gmail.com

ARGUED. Mr. Newdorf and Ms. Whitehead contest the court's TR and present arguments.
The Court comments and poses questions. Counselors respond.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendants Reproductive Science Center of the San Francisco Bay Area (RSC) and Deborah Wachs, M.D.'s amended motion for summary judgment is Taken Under Submission.

Defendants' amended motion for summary adjudication, in the alternative, is Taken Under Submission.

Both parties to file briefs no later than the close of business on Friday, 2/27/26 on the limited issue of admissability re: the declarations of Dr. Eyvazzadeh and Dr. Rychlik.
(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FAMILY CREATIONS, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Amended Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment, Or Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FAMILY CREATIONS, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication

Appearances (by Zoom):
David Newdorf, Esq. 415-357-1234 Newdorf Legal for Plaintiff. (In-person)
Katherine Harwood, Esq. 562-983-2500 Behar Gibbs Savage Paulson LLP for Defendant Family Creations.
Jonquil Whitehead, Esq. 760-913-8425 Hall Prangle LLC for Defendant Reproductive Center et al.
Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, calendar-la@veritext.com.

The Court receives a late notice to contest. The Opposing side does not oppose the late notice to contest. Appearances are stated. The Court announces the tentative ruling.

ARGUED.
Ms. Harwood presents arguments; fraud based claims, cites case authority, assumption of risk, the MSJ and MSA should be granted, Tunkl analysis, bargaining analysis.
The Court poses questions on the nature of the contract, civil code.
Mr. Newdorf responds to Ms. Harwoods arguments; not a demurrer, not pled with specificity, top candidate, duty to disclose, assumption of the risk, concealment, increasing known risk, Tunkl factors.
Ms. Harwood responds.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1 - Defendant's (Family Creations, LLC ("FC")) motion for summary judgment is DENIED. FC's alternative motion for summary adjudication.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, calendar-la@veritext.com, Reported. (302/JMT)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***

Jonquil Whitehead, Esq., Tel. 760.913.8425, for the Defendants;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS REPRODUCTIVE SCIENCE CENTER OF THE SAN FRANCISCO, DEBORAH WACHS, M.D.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The matter is not called in open court.

There being no other appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: granted as unopposed.

The Court to review and sign the proposed order.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported/No For The Record. (301/RCE)
